description_long: This object is a handheld game controller, featuring a symmetrical design with two analog sticks, a directional pad, and four colored action buttons. The surface is predominantly black with a glossy, textured finish and intricate patterns, possibly resembling a custom or themed design. The action buttons are colored red, yellow, green, and blue, while the analog sticks and D-pad are matte black. The central area displays a graphic or logo, adding a unique visual element. The controller is compact, ergonomically shaped for comfortable grip, and appears to be constructed primarily from plastic. It is designed for interactive electronic entertainment, likely compatible with gaming consoles or computers.
description: A black, glossy game controller with colored buttons, dual analog sticks, and a central graphic. The design is ergonomic and visually striking with intricate surface patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual analog sticks, colored action buttons, D-pad, and central graphic clearly.
description_view_1: Left angled view highlighting the D-pad and the left analog stick, with partial visibility of the colored buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the analog sticks and the overall symmetrical shape, with less detail on the buttons.
description_view_3: Right angled view emphasizing the colored action buttons and right analog stick, with the D-pad partially visible.
